Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The CompileProgram method attempts to compile the code supplied by the LoadShaderStage method. Prior to calling this method, the shader program cannot be bound to an IProgramNode, and no information about the shader program can be queried.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
